scripts.test:all: pnpm run lockfile:check && pnpm -r test && pnpm run test:coverage:ci
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter takos-runtime run test:coverage && pnpm --filter takos-cli run test:coverage && pnpm --filter takos-control-app run test:coverage
scripts.test:coverage:ci: node -e "if (!process.env.CI) { console.log('Skipping coverage run (CI not set).'); process.exit(0); } require('node:child_process').execSync('pnpm run test:coverage', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.local:smoke: TAKOS_LOCAL_ENV_FILE=${TAKOS_LOCAL_ENV_FILE:-.env.local} docker compose -f compose.local.yml --env-file ${TAKOS_LOCAL_ENV_FILE:-.env.local} exec -T control-web sh -lc 'TAKOS_LOCAL_WEB_PUBLIC_URL=http://control-web:${TAKOS_CONTROL_WEB_PORT} TAKOS_LOCAL_DISPATCH_PUBLIC_URL=http://control-dispatch:${TAKOS_CONTROL_DISPATCH_PORT} TAKOS_LOCAL_RUNTIME_HOST_PUBLIC_URL=http://runtime-host:${TAKOS_RUNTIME_HOST_PORT} TAKOS_LOCAL_EXECUTOR_HOST_PUBLIC_URL=http://executor-host:${TAKOS_EXECUTOR_HOST_PORT} TAKOS_LOCAL_BROWSER_HOST_PUBLIC_URL=http://browser-host:${TAKOS_BROWSER_HOST_PORT} TAKOS_LOCAL_RUNTIME_PUBLIC_URL=http://runtime:8080 TAKOS_LOCAL_EXECUTOR_PUBLIC_URL=http://executor:8080 TAKOS_LOCAL_BROWSER_PUBLIC_URL=http://browser:8080 node /workspace/scripts/local-smoke.mjs'
scripts.local:proxyless-smoke: TAKOS_LOCAL_ENV_FILE=${TAKOS_LOCAL_ENV_FILE:-.env.local} docker compose -f compose.local.yml --env-file ${TAKOS_LOCAL_ENV_FILE:-.env.local} exec -T control-web sh -lc 'TAKOS_LOCAL_EXECUTOR_HOST_URL=http://executor-host:${TAKOS_EXECUTOR_HOST_PORT} pnpm dev:local:run-smoke-proxyless'
scripts.local:run-smoke: TAKOS_LOCAL_ENV_FILE=${TAKOS_LOCAL_ENV_FILE:-.env.local} docker compose --env-file ${TAKOS_LOCAL_ENV_FILE:-.env.local} -f compose.local.yml exec -T control-web pnpm dev:local:run-smoke
